title: List Craft
description: Never forget what you need again - create, save, and share inventory checklists with live progress tracking
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a853bf748ee1407429afc5a2f2ed91bcb70154b.png)
## What is this?

Ever started building something massive in Minecraft, only to realize halfway through that you forgot half the materials? Or spent ages wandering around trying to remember what you still needed for that complex recipe? Yeah, me too. That's why I made ListCraft.

It's basically a to-do list for your inventory. You tell it what you need, it keeps track of what you have, and shows you the progress in real time. Simple as that.

## **Default Keybind: I**

![Checklist Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c803e370ad6d9766933aa2f916e698c2d7ab7d.png)

- Make lists of items you need (with amounts)
- See your progress live as you collect stuff
- Items show up like "32/64 Oak Planks" or get a green checkmark when done
- Everything appears as a small overlay in the corner of your screen
- Auto-suggests items as you type (works with modded items too! so you can even use create mod items)
- Click on any item in your list to change how many you need
- Save your lists with names
- Share lists with friends using simple codes
- Works on any server since it's client-side only

## Common questions

"Does this work with [insert mod here]?" Probably yes. It automatically finds items from any mod.

"Can I use this on servers?" Yep, since it's client-side only.

"What if I want to change the hotkey?" Controls menu, look for "Inventory Checklist"

"Found a bug" Let me know! I actually read the comments and try to fix stuff.

# Contact Me: [X Link](https://x.com/TheYHDev)
